title: karpatiosorbus meierottii
intro: Karpatiosorbus meierottii, also known as the Karpatian rowan or Meierott's rowan, is a species of rowan tree native to the mountainous regions of eastern Europe. This deciduous tree is rich in medicinal properties, primarily due to its berries, which contain anthocyanins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Karpatiosorbus meierottii berries include supporting cardiovascular health, reducing inflammation, and providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. The berries can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, often in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties and provide a range of health benefits.
